emails.subject: RE: Cutter Oil
emails.body: RE: Cutter Oil Thanks. Could you also look for a Enfolio Master Firm with Kaztex Energy Management Inc. and ENA dated August 1, 2001. To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: Cutter Oil
emails.body: I can't find anything for Kaztex with that date. There are some Firm GTCs, but not with that date. Keep looking? To: Elledge, Susan

emails.subject: RE: Cutter Oil
emails.body: Debra Perelingiere had prepared this contract. Since it was done so recently, it may not have made it into the system yet. Thanks for your help. I'll check Debra's files. To: Nemec, Gerald
